question: What are the conditions to operate a UAS under the influence of psychoactive substances?

options.text: A UA operator is allowed to operate a UAS under the influence of psychoactive substances as long as he/she produces a letter from a designated doctor.
A UA operator is allowed to operate a UAS under the influence of psychoactive substances as long as he/she does not endanger the safety of the UAS operations.
A UA operator must not operate an unmanned aircraft, or be involved in the conduct of a flight involving an unmanned aircraft, if the person is under the influence of any psychoactive substance.
